h1: Landlord Gas Safety Certificate in London and Sussex
intro: We provide landlord gas safety certificate visits across London and Sussex for rental homes, managed blocks and portfolio properties that need clear inspection records and practical follow-up advice.
pricingGuidance: Landlord gas safety pricing depends on appliance count, property access and whether there are additional issues that need follow-up after inspection.
localProof: Used by private landlords, letting agents and portfolio managers who need reliable booking, access coordination and straightforward reporting.

sections.heading: What landlords need from a gas safety visit
sections.body: Rental inspections need to be documented properly, with appliance checks, outcomes and any remedial work clearly explained so there are no gaps after the visit.

sections.heading: Working with agents and managed properties
sections.body: We understand access windows, tenant communication and the extra coordination needed when a letting agent or property manager is involved.

sections.heading: When follow-up work may be needed
sections.body: If defects or safety issues are identified, we explain what they mean, what needs remedial work and how quickly that work should be arranged.
